name: list_users
description: Search and list users in your Auth0 tenant. Supports Lucene query syntax for filtering by email, name, identity provider, or any user attribute. Results are paginated and can be sorted by any field.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Lucene query string to filter users (e.g., 'email:"john@example.com"' or 'name:"John"').

parameters.name: search_engine
parameters.description: Search engine version. Use 'v3' for the latest.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results per page (max 100). Default is 50.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by, with ':1' for ascending or ':-1' for descending.

parameters.name: include_totals
parameters.description: Whether to include the total count in the response.
